mapper.select: SELECT nearest.cs_id, nearest.cs_nm, nearest.addr, nearest.lat, nearest.longi, nearest.distance_km, c.cp_id, c.cp_nm, c.charge_tp, c.cp_tp, c.cp_stat, c.stat_update_datetime FROM ( SELECT s.cs_id, s.cs_nm, s.addr, CAST(TRIM(s.lat) AS DECIMAL(12, 8)) AS lat, CAST(TRIM(s.longi) AS DECIMAL(12, 8)) AS longi, ( 6371 * ACOS( LEAST(1, GREATEST(-1, COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(CAST(TRIM(s.lat) AS DECIMAL(12, 8)))) * COS(RADIANS(CAST(TRIM(s.longi) AS DECIMAL(12, 8))) - RADIANS(#{longi})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{lat})) * SIN(RADIANS(CAST(TRIM(s.lat) AS DECIMAL(12, 8)))) )) ) ) AS distance_km FROM ev_station s WHERE s.lat IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(s.lat) != '' AND TRIM(s.lat) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' AND s.longi IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(s.longi) != '' AND TRIM(s.longi) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' AND CAST(TRIM(s.lat) AS DECIMAL(12, 8)) BETWEEN -90 AND 90 AND CAST(TRIM(s.longi) AS DECIMAL(12, 8)) BETWEEN -180 AND 180 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ev_charger available WHERE available.cs_id = s.cs_id AND TRIM(available.cp_stat) = '1' ) ORDER BY distance_km LIMIT #{limit} ) nearest LEFT JOIN ev_charger c ON c.cs_id = nearest.cs_id ORDER BY nearest.distance_km, nearest.cs_id, c.cp_id

SELECT neighborhood.cs_id, neighborhood.cs_nm, neighborhood.addr, neighborhood.lat, neighborhood.longi, neighborhood.distance_km, c.cp_id, c.cp_nm, c.charge_tp, c.cp_tp, c.cp_stat, c.stat_update_datetime FROM ( SELECT s.cs_id, s.cs_nm, s.addr, CAST(TRIM(s.lat) AS DECIMAL(12, 8)) AS lat, CAST(TRIM(s.longi) AS DECIMAL(12, 8)) AS longi, ( 6371 * ACOS( LEAST(1, GREATEST(-1, COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(CAST(TRIM(s.lat) AS DECIMAL(12, 8)))) * COS(RADIANS(CAST(TRIM(s.longi) AS DECIMAL(12, 8))) - RADIANS(#{longi})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{lat})) * SIN(RADIANS(CAST(TRIM(s.lat) AS DECIMAL(12, 8)))) )) ) ) AS distance_km FROM ev_station s WHERE s.addr LIKE CONCAT('%', #{neighborhood}, '%') AND s.lat IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(s.lat) != '' AND TRIM(s.lat) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' AND s.longi IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(s.longi) != '' AND TRIM(s.longi) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' AND CAST(TRIM(s.lat) AS DECIMAL(12, 8)) BETWEEN -90 AND 90 AND CAST(TRIM(s.longi) AS DECIMAL(12, 8)) BETWEEN -180 AND 180 ORDER BY distance_km ) neighborhood LEFT JOIN ev_charger c ON c.cs_id = neighborhood.cs_id ORDER BY neighborhood.distance_km, neighborhood.cs_id, c.cp_id
